name: social-profiling
description: Social profiling Phase 3-4: self-hosted blocklist, external HTTP API provider, channel opt-in, security wizard social settings
goals: Generic external social API with timeout and redacted logging
Per-channel opt-in for external API at verify submit
Admin /security wizard controls for instant-ban categories and social toggles

requirements.description: Self-hosted blocklist provider loads JSON and maps known user ids to hard categories
acceptance: Known telegram_user_id returns hard category from blocklist
pytest uses tests/fixtures/social_blocklist.json without live network

requirements.description: ExternalApiProvider calls SOCIAL_API_URL with httpx timeout and maps JSON response
acceptance: Response maps hard_categories soft_signals risk_score summary
pytest uses httpx mock fixture no live API

requirements.description: Channel policy social_external_api_enabled gates external provider at verify
acceptance: get_composite_provider includes external only when policy flag and URL set
Blocklist always included when SOCIAL_BLOCKLIST_PATH configured

requirements.description: Security wizard instant-ban category multi-select and social toggles
acceptance: Wizard steps after network categories for instant-ban and social settings
format_policy_summary shows instant-ban and social lines

requirements.description: Social BLOCK from external/blocklist uses structured persist_ban category
acceptance: verify submit BLOCK from social_hard uses block_ban_taxonomy or social category
Admin ops card shows social source in More details

requirements.description: Integration tests for blocklist hard ban and external API soft/hard mapping
